titleStmt.title: SII 23.409: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 409. (A.R. No. 409 of 1907.) Periyakuḷam, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājēndrachōḷīśvara temple—on the west wall of the central shrine Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 26: 1293-94 A.D.

summary.p: Stones lost at the right end. This registers an agreement given by the Muppaduvaṭṭattu-Śivabrāhmaṇas (priests) of the temple of Rājēndrachōḷīśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at Ālaṅguḷam in Mēneḍuṅgaḷa-nāḍu to burn four lamps in different shrines for the amount of 40 paṇam received by them from Tāraṉ Uyyavandāṉ Kāḍuveṭṭi of Podiyil-Puttūr in Śīvala-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6vatu meṉeṭuṅkaḷa nāṭṭu Ālaṅkuḷamāṉa teciya virapaṭṭiṉattu U
ṭaiyār Irājentra coḷicuramuṭaiyanāyanaār koyilil śrīrudra śrīmāheśvararom Ikkoyilil muppatu vaṭṭattomum civalavaḷa nāṭṭu potiyil puttūr tāraṉ Uyyavantāṉ kāṭuveṭṭipaṉmaṉ [pakkalpaṟṟiṉa śu nāṟpatu Ippaṇa tukku tiruppaḷḷiyeḻucci
tiruviḷakku Uṭaiyāṟku kuviyoṉṟum mutaliyāṟku maṇṭapattukku viḷakku yoṉṟum coṟuṭai nācciyāṟku viḷakku yoṉṟum Iḷaiya piḷḷaiyāṟku yoṉṟum cantrādityapakal kuṭamuṅ kucciyuṅ koṇṭu koyilukkuḷḷu puku vārkaḷ tiruviḷakku 4- m
kālam peṟa yeḻuku tiru ntu māheśvarakaṇkāṇippaṭi Iṭṭup potuvom Ākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu ceyyakkaṭavomākakaṟkaḷile veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ikkoyilil civabrahmaṇaro mippaṭi sam matittu virapattirapaṭṭa m kāṇaviṉiya bhaṭ
ṭaṉum cakravattikaḷum tiruttoṇṭa bha
mippaṭi sammatittom Ivai virapat
ttu Ivai cakravatti Eḻuttu Ivai tirutto
tu Ivai namaṇibhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi kalve
Digital edition of SII 23.409 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
